parameters.query:
SELECT
  c.id::TEXT AS id,
  c.channel,
  c.status,
  c.last_message_at,
  c.created_at,
  c.updated_at,
  c.bot_enabled,
  u.id::TEXT AS customer_user_id,
  u.external_user_id,
  u.display_name,
  u.picture_url,
  u.phone,
  u.email,
  COALESCE((SELECT m.content_text FROM messages m WHERE m.conversation_id = c.id AND m.is_deleted = FALSE ORDER BY m.created_at DESC LIMIT 1), '') AS last_message,
  COALESCE((SELECT json_agg(json_build_object('id', t.id::TEXT, 'name', t.name, 'color', t.color, 'scope', t.scope) ORDER BY t.name) FROM conversation_tags ct JOIN tags t ON ct.tag_id = t.id WHERE ct.conversation_id = c.id), '[]'::json) AS labels,
  (SELECT COUNT(*)::INT FROM messages m WHERE m.conversation_id = c.id AND m.direction = 'inbound' AND m.is_deleted = FALSE AND NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM message_read_receipts r WHERE r.message_id = m.id)) AS unread_count
FROM conversations c
JOIN users u ON c.customer_user_id = u.id
WHERE c.status != 'archived'
ORDER BY c.last_message_at DESC NULLS LAST
LIMIT 50;

SELECT COALESCE((SELECT json_agg(json_build_object('id', m.id::TEXT, 'conversationId', m.conversation_id::TEXT, 'senderType', m.sender_type, 'type', m.sender_type, 'direction', m.direction, 'messageType', m.message_type, 'content', COALESCE(m.content_text, ''), 'contentText', COALESCE(m.content_text, ''), 'sender', json_build_object('id', COALESCE(u.id::TEXT, m.sender_type), 'name', COALESCE(u.display_name, u.external_user_id, m.sender_type), 'type', m.sender_type, 'avatar', u.picture_url), 'timestamp', m.created_at, 'isRead', true) ORDER BY m.created_at ASC) FROM messages m LEFT JOIN users u ON m.sender_user_id = u.id WHERE m.conversation_id = '{{ $json.query.conversationId }}'::UUID AND m.is_deleted = FALSE), '[]'::json) AS messages, (SELECT COUNT(*)::INT FROM messages WHERE conversation_id = '{{ $json.query.conversationId }}'::UUID AND is_deleted = FALSE) AS total;

WITH conv_user AS (
  SELECT u.external_user_id
  FROM   conversations c
  JOIN   users u ON c.customer_user_id = u.id
  WHERE  c.id = '{{ $json.body.conversationId }}'::UUID
),
inserted AS (
  INSERT INTO messages (conversation_id, sender_type, direction, message_type, content_text)
  VALUES (
    '{{ $json.body.conversationId }}'::UUID,
    'admin',
    'outbound',
    'text',
    '{{ $json.body.content }}'
  )
  RETURNING id::TEXT, conversation_id::TEXT, sender_type, content_text, created_at
)
SELECT i.*, cu.external_user_id
FROM   inserted i, conv_user cu;

parameters.jsCode:
const saved = $('PG: Save Admin Message').first().json;
return [{ json: {
  id:            saved.id,
  conversationId: saved.conversation_id,
  senderType:    'admin',
  type:          'admin',
  direction:     'outbound',
  messageType:   'text',
  contentText:   saved.content_text,
  content:       saved.content_text || '',
  sender: { id: 'admin', name: 'Admin', type: 'admin' },
  timestamp:     saved.created_at,
  isRead:        true,
  lineSent:      true,
} }];

parameters.query:
DELETE FROM conversation_tags
WHERE conversation_id = '{{ $json.conversationId }}'::UUID;

{{ $json.tags.map((t) => `WITH t_upsert AS (
  INSERT INTO tags (name, color, scope)
  VALUES ('${String(t.name).replace(/'/g,"''")}', '${String(t.color).replace(/'/g,"''")}', 'conversation')
  ON CONFLICT (name, scope) DO UPDATE SET color = EXCLUDED.color
  RETURNING id
)
INSERT INTO conversation_tags (conversation_id, tag_id)
SELECT '${$json.conversationId}'::UUID, id FROM t_upsert;`).join('\n') }}

SELECT
  '{{ $json.conversationId }}' AS conversation_id,
  COALESCE(
    json_agg(
      json_build_object('id', t.id::TEXT, 'name', t.name, 'color', t.color)
      ORDER BY t.name
    ),
    '[]'::json
  ) AS labels
FROM  conversation_tags ct
JOIN  tags t ON ct.tag_id = t.id
WHERE ct.conversation_id = '{{ $json.conversationId }}'::UUID;

SELECT
  (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM conversations WHERE status != 'archived')             AS total_conversations,
  (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM conversations WHERE status IN ('open','pending'))     AS human_required,
  0                                                                           AS bot_handled,
  (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM messages WHERE created_at >= CURRENT_DATE
                                    AND is_deleted = FALSE)                   AS today_messages,
  (SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT c.id)
   FROM   conversations c
   JOIN   users u ON c.customer_user_id = u.id
   WHERE  u.channel = 'line')                                                 AS line_count,
  (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM conversations WHERE status = 'resolved')              AS resolved_count;

CREATE UNIQUE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS idx_tags_name_scope ON tags (name, scope);
SELECT id::TEXT, name, color, scope FROM tags ORDER BY name;

parameters.jsCode:
const rows = $input.all().map(i => i.json).filter(r => r.id);
return [{ json: { tags: rows, total: rows.length } }];

parameters.query:
DELETE FROM conversation_tags WHERE tag_id = '{{ $json.body.tagId }}'::UUID;
DELETE FROM tags WHERE id = '{{ $json.body.tagId }}'::UUID RETURNING id::TEXT;
